name: local-plugins
description: Local development marketplace for Anti-Vibe Coding plugin

plugins.name: anti-vibe-coding
plugins.description: Plugin de desenvolvimento disciplinado com conhecimentos de programador senior. v7.2.0 — agent-skills-import Waves 1/2/3 + compound-engineering-skill-port. Wave 1: CI test-plugin-install + 3 references seed + 2 skills novas (incremental-implementation, code-simplification) + Common Rationalizations/Red Flags em 5 skills + Hypothesis refactor grill-me. Wave 2: 13 agentes em subagent-contract v2.0.0 + validator anti-generico + 3 skills novas (source-driven, doubt-driven, git-workflow) + pedagogia ADR em decision-registry. Wave 3: /anti-vibe-review -> /verify-work consolidacao + Prove-It Mode no tdd-verifier + 3 references (init-step-contract, hooks-checklist, tdd-cycle-checklist) + Test Sizes/DAMP-DRY em tdd-workflow + Task Sizing em plan-feature + Pipeline de Trabalho flowchart AGENTS.md. Compound: skill user-invocable com 4 subcomandos (install/check/migrate/gate) + bug fix MH-01 schema canonico + git mv 10 templates + patches P1/P2 idempotentes. Total: 38 skills (+5 vs 7.1.0).
